repo_prior_art.cite: none; the failed pid_mediation_proxy proposal concerns a different proxy-null construction

published_prior_art.cite: tian_pearl_2000_probabilities_causation gives generic sharp PN bounds; dawid_murtas_musio_2014_bounding_pc_mediation studies a complete mediator under no confounding
dawid_murtas_musio_2014_bounding_pc_mediation and dawid_humphreys_musio_2024_bound_causes_effects_mediators give mediator-informed PC bounds under stronger no-confounding process assumptions

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_mediation_proxy is a failed proxy-null mechanism and contains no defier-face strictness frontier

published_prior_art.cite: No verified paper gives an observable iff criterion for strict PN-endpoint contraction from deleting mediator-defier response types; kawakami_tian_2025_mediation_analysis_poc instead identifies path-specific PNS under sequential ignorability and outcome/composite monotonicity

fang_santos_2019_directionally_differentiable supplies the general directional-delta and modified-bootstrap result; chernozhukov_lee_rosen_2013_intersection_bounds is additional close envelope-inference prior art
none; the stated reduction is not valid for sign-free identified sets

novelty_flags.label: Open-ended Question oeq:canonical-defier-threshold
novelty_flags.one_line: The survey omits close mediator-PC work: Dawid, Humphreys, and Musio (2024) derives PC bounds for complete mediator chains, and Kawakami and Tian (AAAI 2025) explicitly positions mediator-PC bounding as the weak-assumption alternative to its identification results.

soundness_flags.label: ass:mediator-monotonicity
soundness_flags.one_line: The cited Rubinstein, Cuellar, and Malinsky (2025) paper does not support the stated one-sided mediator-response condition M_1>=M_0; its monotonicity assumptions concern outcome or composite response functions, so this standard tag needs a correct source or a novel tag with justification.

soundness_flags.label: Proposition prop:no-cross-arm-mediator-response
soundness_flags.one_line: M_0=M_1 in the data-generating law does not constrain every sign-free q in Q_0(p); observationally compatible sign-free completions can contain compensating compliers and defiers, so deleting D can still change [L_0,U_0].

soundness_flags.label: Theorem thm:pn-endpoint-limit
soundness_flags.one_line: hat p_n divides by the random arm count, which is zero with positive finite-n probability under assignment positivity alone; specify a total estimator convention or condition on nonempty arms before asserting its law and bootstrap.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add Dawid, Humphreys, and Musio (2024) and Kawakami and Tian (2025), then state precisely that neither analyzes the arbitrary mediator-outcome-confounded response polytope or its observable defier-face strictness condition.

Replace the false no-cross-arm-response proposition with an observable sufficient-and-necessary condition that Q_0(p) itself lies on the no-defier face, or demote it and give a valid equality case such as Q_0(p)=Q_1(p).

Define T explicitly as a finite comparison of the surviving dual pieces, provide a small nondegenerate p exhibit with both endpoint gains positive, and state the bootstrap convention on samples outside P_1 or with an empty arm.

recommended_next_step: Revise the literature positioning, repair the invalid sanity proposition and finite-sample estimator definition, then return the field-grade defier-face frontier for re-review.
